docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN HOLMES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-19-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT AND APPEARING IN COURT IS JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT TAKETRA SESSION IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SESSION, TAKETRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HOLMS, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT TAKETRA SESSION IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
